hero.descriptionText: is an operating system where auto services work every day. Become the "default supplier". While competitors are waiting for a call, the mechanic is already ordering from you in one click.

offer.title: What we offer?
offer.subtitle: We remove all barriers between your warehouse and the auto service order.
offer.nativeText: Your spare parts and prices appear inside the MECHorbit interface when a mechanic searches for a needed part. This is not a banner. It is part of their daily tool. Ordering from you becomes the fastest and most logical choice.
offer.aiText: No API? No problem. You don't need to develop anything. Just give us access to your B2B portal (login/password). Our AI agents analyze your prices and stock in real-time and stream them into our system. Zero technical effort from your side.

whyChoose.label: DEMAND GUARANTEE
whyChoose.title: Why auto services choose MECHorbit?
whyChoose.subtitle: Your sales depend on the activity of our platform. That's why auto services don't just use it, they become dependent on MECHorbit:
whyChoose.clientsText: Our mobile app for car owners is a constant stream of "hot" leads for auto services.
whyChoose.moneyText: Our AI cameras show real losses from downtime, motivating them to optimize their processes.
whyChoose.simpleText: MECHorbit replaces 5–6 programs with one convenient tool.
whyChoose.bottomText: We create the most effective auto services in the country. And it is easiest for them to order parts from you.

way.title: The path of least resistance
way.subtitle: One click vs. a phone call. One click always wins. See the process through the eyes of an auto service:
way.step1Text: The mechanic in the mobile app adds to the order
way.step2Accent: photo of the part, catalog, availability, brand, price
way.step3Text2: The order automatically goes to you.
way.bottomQuestion: Will they close the app, search for the phone, call your competitor, wait on the line… if the simplest, fastest, and most reliable way is just one click?

request.title: Ready to get more orders?
request.text: Start with a simple step. Request a free integration of your catalog into the MECHorbit ecosystem and see how it works. No obligations.
